US: US1: Save and insert predefined responses in chats
AC: AC1: Add Saved Response button in Editor nav
Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Observe the Editor nav
4. Verify Saved Responses button
Title: button next to GIF button
Expectation: - SHOULD display Saved Responses button next to the GIF button

Step:
1. Hover over the Saved Responses button
2. Verify tooltip
Title: button tooltip
Expectation: - SHOULD show tooltip: Saved Responses

Step:
1. Click the Saved Responses button / press Ctrl+K (Windows) or Cmd+K (Mac)
2. Verify modal
Title: modal opens via button / shortcut
Expectation: - SHOULD display the Saved Responses modal

Step:
1. Observe the modal
2. Verify modal elements
Title: modal elements exist
Expectation: - SHOULD contain X button, Search box, Create new button in top-right corner

Title: Create new button tooltip
Expectation: - SHOULD show tooltip: Create New on hover over Create new button

Title: empty state message
Expectation: - SHOULD display: Your saved responses list is empty. Start by creating your first one to save time during chats.

Title: list ordered by latest updated time
Expectation: - SHOULD display saved responses list ordered by latest updated time below the Search box

Title: FREQUENTLY USED section shown when usage exists
Expectation: - SHOULD show FREQUENTLY USED section with top 5 most-used responses, sorted by usage_count descending then title A-Z

Title: FREQUENTLY USED hidden when no usage
Expectation: - SHOULD hide FREQUENTLY USED section when no responses have been used

Title: usage count increments per user on append
Expectation: - SHOULD increment usage count per user each time a response is appended to the chatbox

Title: ALL section sorted A-Z
Expectation: - SHOULD list all saved responses in ALL section sorted by title A-Z

Title: first item selected by default
Expectation: - SHOULD select the first saved response by default

Title: arrow key navigation
Expectation: - SHOULD allow Up/Down arrow keys to move between responses

Title: right-side message detail panel
Expectation: - SHOULD show title and message detail on the right side of the modal for the selected response

Title: 3-dot button on message detail hover
Expectation: - SHOULD show 3-dot button when hovering over message detail

Title: scroll for long messages
Expectation: - SHOULD allow scrolling for long messages in message detail view

Title: hover updates detail view
Expectation: - SHOULD update message detail view when hovering over different titles in the list

Title: pagination — load 20 items with Load more on scroll
Expectation: - SHOULD load 20 items initially and show Load more on scroll

Title: footer shortcuts hint
Expectation: - SHOULD display shortcuts in footer: X button or Esc to close popup

Step:
1. Click X button / press Esc
2. Verify modal
Title: X / Esc closes modal
Expectation: - SHOULD close the Saved Responses modal

Step:
1. Click a response title in the list
2. Verify chatbox
Title: click title fills chatbox
Expectation: - SHOULD append full message content into the chatbox

Step:
1. Open Saved Responses modal
2. Observe Search box
3. Verify default state
Title: search box default state
Expectation: - SHOULD be empty with placeholder: Search saved response

Step:
1. Click/focus the Search box
2. Verify placeholder
Title: placeholder on focus
Expectation: - SHOULD change placeholder to: Enter keyword...

Step:
1. Type any character in Search box
2. Verify x icon
Title: x icon appears on input
Expectation: - SHOULD display x icon when text is entered

Step:
1. Type text in Search box
2. Click x icon / press Backspace to clear
3. Verify list
Title: clear x / backspace restores full list
Expectation: - SHOULD remove text and display the full saved responses list

Step:
1. Type 1 character in Search box
2. Verify search fires
Title: search starts from 1 character
Expectation: - SHOULD trigger search and filter results from the first character typed

Step:
1. Type keyword matching title or message (case-insensitive, partial)
2. Verify results
Title: case-insensitive partial match on title and message
Expectation: - SHOULD return matching results searching on both title and message fields, case-insensitively

Step:
1. Type keyword with no matching results
2. Verify UI
Title: no results state
Expectation: - SHOULD show: Search results (0)

Step:
1. Type keyword with matching results
2. Verify result count and list
Title: results found state
Expectation:
- SHOULD show: Search results ({N}) and list results ordered per AC2 rules
- SHOULD select the first result by default

Step:
1. Search with results spanning more than 20 items
2. Verify pagination
Title: search pagination loads 20 items
Expectation: - SHOULD load every 20 items in search results

Step:
1. Open Saved Responses modal
2. Hover over message detail to reveal 3-dot button
3. Click 3-dot button
4. Verify submenu
Title: 3-dot submenu options
Expectation: - SHOULD show submenu with options: Edit response and Delete response

AC: AC5: Add a new saved response
Step:
1. Open Saved Responses modal
2. Click Create new button
3. Verify popup
Title: Create Saved Response popup opens
Expectation: - SHOULD display popup titled Create Saved Response

Step:
1. Observe popup elements
2. Verify fields and buttons
Title: popup fields and buttons
Expectation: - SHOULD contain TITLE field (required), MESSAGE field (required), Cancel button, Save button, and X button

Title: TITLE field tooltip and placeholder
Expectation:
- SHOULD show tooltip: Used to organize responses. This won't appear in messages.
- SHOULD show placeholder: Name this response for easy search

Title: TITLE field 140 char limit
Expectation: - SHOULD allow max 140 characters; excess text cut off on paste

Title: MESSAGE field placeholder and no formatting
Expectation:
- SHOULD show placeholder: Write the full message you want to send to clients
- SHOULD NOT allow text formatting

Title: MESSAGE field 10000 char limit with count
Expectation: - SHOULD allow max 10,000 characters; show character count as {X}/10000; excess text cut off on paste

Title: Save button disabled by default
Expectation: - SHOULD be disabled when TITLE or MESSAGE is empty

Step:
1. Fill both TITLE and MESSAGE fields
2. Verify Save button
Title: Save button enabled when both fields filled
Expectation: - SHOULD be enabled when both TITLE and MESSAGE are filled

Step:
1. Fill both fields
2. Click Save
3. Verify toast
Title: save success toast
Expectation: - SHOULD display toast: New Saved Response created.

Step:
1. Click Cancel button / X button
2. Verify popup
Title: Cancel / X closes popup
Expectation: - SHOULD close the Create Saved Response popup

Step:
1. Open Saved Responses modal
2. Hover over message detail to reveal 3-dot button
3. Click 3-dot button
4. Click Edit response
5. Verify popup
Title: Edit Saved Response popup opens
Expectation: - SHOULD display popup titled Edit Saved Response

Step:
1. Observe TITLE and MESSAGE fields
2. Verify pre-populated data
Title: fields pre-populated with existing data
Expectation: - SHOULD pre-populate TITLE and MESSAGE with existing saved response data

Step:
1. Make no changes
2. Click X button / Cancel
3. Verify popup closes
Title: X / Cancel closes without changes
Expectation: - SHOULD close popup without showing Discard Changes? popup when no changes made

Step:
1. Make changes to fields
2. Click X button / Cancel
3. Verify Discard Changes? popup
Title: Discard Changes? popup appears on unsaved changes
Expectation: - SHOULD show Discard Changes? popup with text: Are you sure you want to go? Changes have not been saved yet.

Step:
1. Fill both fields
2. Click Save
3. Verify toast
Title: edit save success toast
Expectation: - SHOULD display toast: Saved Response updated successfully.

Step:
1. Open Saved Responses modal
2. Hover over message detail to reveal 3-dot button
3. Click 3-dot button
4. Click Delete response
5. Verify confirmation popup
Title: Delete Response? confirmation popup
Expectation: - SHOULD show confirmation popup titled Delete Response? with text: This response will be permanently deleted and can't be recovered. Are you sure you want to proceed?

Step:
1. Click OK in confirmation popup
2. Verify result
Title: OK deletes response and shows toast
Expectation: - SHOULD delete the response and display toast: Saved Response deleted.

AC: AC8: Add saved response to chat box
Step:
1. Open Saved Responses modal
2. Click title of a saved response / press Enter
3. Verify chatbox
Title: click title / Enter appends to chatbox
Expectation: - SHOULD append full message content into the chatbox behind current text

US: US2: Create saved response from a message in conversation
AC: AC1: Add Save this response button to Coach's non-text message
Step:
1. Login as Coach (workspace on Pro/Studio plan)
2. Open a conversation
3. Hover over a non-text message sent by Coach
4. Verify button
Title: Save this response button appears on hover
Expectation: - SHOULD display Save this response button between 3-dot and Reply buttons

Title: button tooltip
Expectation: - SHOULD show tooltip: Saved this response

Step:
1. Login as Coach (workspace on free/trial plan)
2. Hover over a non-text Coach message
3. Verify button visibility
Title: button hidden on non-paid plan
Expectation: - SHOULD NOT display Save this response button when workspace is not on a paid plan

AC: AC2: Add new saved response from the conversation
Step:
1. Hover over a Coach non-text message
2. Click Save this response button
3. Verify popup
Title: Add To Saved Responses popup opens
Expectation: - SHOULD display popup titled Add To Saved Responses

Step:
1. Observe TITLE and MESSAGE fields
2. Verify pre-populated state
Title: Title blank, Message pre-populated
Expectation:
- SHOULD leave Title field blank
- SHOULD pre-populate Message field with the Coach's message (max 10,000 characters)

Step:
1. Fill TITLE field
2. Click Save
3. Verify result
Title: save adds response with toast
Expectation: - SHOULD add the response and display toast: Response has been saved.
